metadata.name: Add a Meal Plan to Park Ticket

description: A customer who has already purchased theme park tickets wants to add a one-day meal plan.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the customer's existing ticket order.
Explain the different meal plan options and their prices.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly presents the meal plan choices.

nodes.task_description: Add the selected meal plan to the customer's booking and process the payment.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully adds the meal plan and updates the customer's tickets.
